introSection: Ridgeline Racer is a steel kiddie powered coaster formerly located at American Adventures in Marietta, Georgia, USA.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
The coaster opened with the park in 1990.

After the park closed in February 2010, the ride sat abandoned with the rest of the park. The coaster cars and parts of the track were sold to a third party and situated at Kirby Family Farm in Williston. As of November 2023, they remain at the farm.

fullText:
Ridgeline Racer is a steel kiddie powered coaster formerly located at American Adventures in Marietta, Georgia, USA.

The coaster opened with the park in 1990.

After the park closed in February 2010, the ride sat abandoned with the rest of the park. The coaster cars and parts of the track were sold to a third party and situated at Kirby Family Farm in Williston. As of November 2023, they remain at the farm.
